rulings.Case Title: STEVE RYAN VS. MITCHELL ROSENFELD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joint Motion For Final Order Dismissing Action Under Ccp
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT SILKE FINIS Notice Of Joint Motion For Final Order Dismissing Action Under CCP DENIED. "[If the first action results in a judgment on the merits for the defendant, his or her plea in abatement becomes a "plea in bar," i.e., instead of a temporary objection to trial of the second action, the defendant has a permanent defense of res judicata. The defendant is entitled to set up his new plea by amended or supplemental answer. (See 5 Witkin, Cal. Procedure (5th ed. 2008), Pleading, §1149; Lord v. Garland (1946) 27 Cal.2d 840,851].) The Court grants Defendants leave to file an amended or supplemental answer to allege plea in bar. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TERESITA POBRE VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE, A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS LEGAL TITLE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff has failed allege facts to support US Bank's liability as to any cause of action alleged against US Bank, e.g. duty (contractual, statutory, successor liability) . = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ROSITA GUZMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication Against Rosita Guzman
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication Against Rosita Guzman DENIED. The Court finds a triable issue of material facts as to: 1. Whether the December 31, 2018 incident is a material breach of the lease. There are no clear "rules" as to when a breach crosses the line from "trivial" to "substantial[,]" determining whether the incident amounts to a material breach of the lease is a question of fact. (See Boston LLC v. Juarez (2016) 245 CA 4th 75, 83 (citing text); NIVO 1 LLC v. Antunez (2013) 217 CA4th Supp. 1, 5.] Plaintiff's moving papers and the previous WVRO proceeding indicate only that a credible threat of violence occurred on December 31, 2018, not that it legally suffices as a material breach of the lease. 2. Defendant's affirmative defense of retaliatory eviction under Civil Code section 1942.5(d). Civil Code section 1942.5(d) makes it unlawful for a landlord to engage in specified conduct against a tenant who is not in default on rent, including "bring[ing] an action to recover possession," because of a tenant's lawful and peaceable exercise of any rights under the law. Defendant raises a triable issue of fact as to whether the January 25, 2019 WVRO hearing in which Defendant represented herself, and subsequent service of Notice to Quit on January 29, 2019 supports such a retaliatory eviction affirmative defense. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ROSITA GUZMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Rosita Guzman'S Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories (Unlawful Detainer) And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Rosita Guzman And Ryan Murphy In The Amount Of $335.00
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Rosita Guzman'S Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories (Unlawful Detainer) And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Rosita Guzman And Ryan Murphy In The Amount Of $335.00 CONTINUED to June 12, 2019 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501. rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SOO YOUNG OH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT SOO YOUNG OH, JIN MYUNG OH MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Court's lacks jurisdiction in the absence of proper verification. Further, verification is sufficient per CCP 446. = (501/CFH)
